results.title: Dupely

## About Dupely

### What is Dupely?

Dupely is a browser extension and mobile app that helps you stop overpaying on Amazon by finding identical products for less. Instead of chasing coupons or waiting for sales, Dupely scans product pages in real time to surface cheaper, verified duplicates — and flags whether a "deal" is actually a fake savings. It works on Chrome, Brave, iOS, and Android, acting as a trust layer for online shopping.

### Who it's for [...] Dupely | aat.ee

# Dupely

Dupely - Product Image

Most shopping tools chase coupons. Dupely tackles trust. Online shopping is full of manipulation: artificial price drops, fake reviews, paid influencers, and sketchy white label sellers reselling the same product at a markup. DupeScore finds identical products for less. Trust This Price flags fake savings using 90 days of price history. Seller badges show you who's actually credible. Now on iOS, Android, and Chrome. Dupely is the trust layer online shopping has been missing.

## About Dupely

### What is Dupely? [...] Most shopping tools are built around discounts and promo codes. Dupely is built around trust. It uses 90 days of price history to flag fake savings, identifies identical white-label products being resold at a markup, and scores each match so you know the dupe is real. It's not about finding a deal — it's about knowing you're not being tricked.

### Worth checking out if…

You shop on Amazon regularly and want to stop second-guessing whether you're paying too much. If you've ever seen a "70% off" badge and wondered if it's real, or found the same product listed under different brand names at wildly different prices, Dupely gives you the clarity you need — right inside your browser or phone.

results.title: Dupely: The Trust Layer for Online Shopping - ProductDirs
results.content:
Dupely serves as a crucial trust layer for online shopping, aiming to empower consumers by combating common forms of manipulation. The platform is designed for shoppers who are wary of deceptive practices such as artificial price drops, fake reviews, and inflated markups from white-label sellers. Its core purpose is to provide transparency and confidence in every online purchase. Online shopping, while convenient, is often fraught with challenges that erode consumer trust. Shoppers frequently encounter misleading pricing strategies, inauthentic reviews that sway purchasing decisions, and influencers promoting products without genuine endorsement. Furthermore, the proliferation of resellers offering the same items at higher prices creates an environment where consumers struggle to find [...] on iOS, Android, and Chrome extensions, with support for Brave and Edge browsers planned. The service is offered for free. The core team includes individuals like Jacob Galajda and Ryan Butz, who are actively involved in its development and community engagement. In essence, Dupely provides an essential layer of trust and transparency to online shopping, equipping consumers with the tools needed to navigate the complexities of e-commerce and make confident, value-driven purchases. [...] ### Who is this for?

Dupely is designed for online shoppers who are concerned about deceptive practices and seek to make informed purchasing decisions. This includes consumers wary of artificial price drops, fake reviews, and inflated prices from resellers. It is particularly beneficial for individuals who frequently shop online and want to ensure they are getting genuine value and dealing with credible vendors. The tool aims to empower everyday shoppers, providing them with the confidence to navigate the complexities of e-commerce and avoid common pitfalls.

Last modified:  July 7, 2026  | Fred Magni

Ever felt that pang of buyer’s remorse, wondering if you overpaid for that sweet gadget or must-have accessory? Meet Dupely, the digital sidekick engineered to combat overpaying. It’s not just a tool; it’s your personal trust layer for online shopping, meticulously designed to unearth identical products at genuinely better prices across marketplaces, all without ever leaving your current page. Think of it as your shopping superpower, ensuring every click is a smart buy.

Visit WebsiteHave an AI Tool? Submit it here! [...] ## Target Audience: The Smart Shopper’s Profile

If you’re tired of digital FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out on a better deal) or simply value intelligent purchasing, Dupely is your essential browser companion. It’s built for:

   The Amazon Enthusiast: Initially optimized for Amazon, providing unparalleled insights on products from this giant marketplace.
   The Budget-Conscious Buyer: Anyone looking to maximize their savings without compromising on product quality or authenticity.
   The Trust-Seeking Consumer: Shoppers who demand verification that they’re getting the exact product they intend, from a reliable source.
   The Efficiency Evangelist: Those who appreciate a single, powerful tool to simplify their deal-hunting without endless tab-hopping or coupon searching. [...] Submit Your Tool →
   DupeScore™ & MatchScore™: A proprietary algorithm that scores product matches from 0-100, confirming identical items and their authenticity.
   Real-time Price Intelligence: Surfacing daily price drops, live deals, and deals of the day the moment they hit.
   Bestseller & Viral Dupes: Identifies cheaper twins of popular Amazon bestsellers and trending products.
   Early Promo Codes: Applies working codes at checkout and gives you a heads-up on promotions before they even go live.
   Verified Seller Check: No gray-market listings. Dupely ensures you buy from trusted, verified sellers, guaranteeing product authenticity.

Typical Savings30–75% on best-selling products
Core TechnologyImage, spec, and seller info analysis for identical product detection

# Dupely
You only need one tool to stop overpaying
Technology, Information and Internet • N/A • 58 followers • 11-50 employees

## Overview
Dupely helps shoppers cut through the noise of lookalike products, fake reviews, and pricing tricks. We surface smarter, trusted alternatives across Amazon, Walmart, Wayfair, TikTok Shop, and more. Our goal is to solve this problem across every major marketplace shoppers use. No guesswork. No gimmicks. Just the right product, at the right price, from a source you can trust. Available now on iOS, Android, Chrome, and Brave.

### Website

### Crunchbase

### Industry
Technology, Information and Internet [...] purchase. Average product price dropped from $45 to $28, without sacrificing quality. Early Access is now open! 👉 Sign up to get the download link → dupely.io Available as a browser extension + mobile app. [Likes: 13, Comments: 0]; Dupely (4mo): We just opened the beta waitlist for Dupely. This has been years of watching online shopping get louder, messier, and less honest, and deciding to actually do something about it. Too many identical products, fake certainty, manipulated prices, and reviews you can’t trust. Dupely is built to cut through that and give people confidence at the moment they’re about to buy. No hype. No gimmicks. Just clarity. We put together a short intro video to show what we’re building and why. If you’ve ever hesitated before clicking buy because something felt off, [...] Dupely (2mo): That "50% off" deal on Amazon? The price was raised two weeks ago. That's not some "glitch". That's how online marketplaces work today. Prices get inflated before "sales." Reviews get manipulated. Identical products get listed dozens of times at wildly different prices. And no existing tool actually solves this. They just hand you a coupon code and hope for the best. So we built Dupely. Our AI works in real time while you shop to: → Detect pricing games and flag inflated "deals" → Surface better-value alternatives ranked by our proprietary Dupe Score → Analyze seller trust signals and review authenticity → Show you the right product at the right price, not just the cheapest one Alpha users saved an average of 38% per purchase. Average product price dropped from $45 to $28,
